code:
sequenceDiagram
    title PHP Application Request Lifecycle
    
    participant Client as Client Browser
    participant Apache as Apache Server
    participant PHP as PHP-FPM
    participant index as index.php
    participant Request as HttpRequest
    participant Response as HttpResponse
    participant Session as Session
    participant Router as Router
    participant Route as Route
    participant Middleware as Middlewares
    participant Controller as Controller
    participant Model as Model
    participant DB as Database
    
    Client->>Apache: HTTP Request
    Apache->>PHP: Forward to PHP-FPM via socket
    PHP->>index: Execute index.php
    
    index->>index: Load autoloader
    index->>index: Load environment variables
    index->>Session: Create Session
    Session->>Session: Start session
    index->>Request: Create HttpRequest
    Request->>Request: Parse request data
    index->>Response: Create HttpResponse
    index->>Router: Create Router(CloudNative_Serverless)
    
    Router->>Router: Load routes from routes.json
    index->>Router: route(CloudNative_HelmChart)
    
    Router->>Router: Get request method & URI
    Router->>Router: searchRoute(CloudNative_Serverless)
    Router->>Route: Create Route object
    Route->>Route: Parse route parameters
    Route->>Route: Load middlewares
    
    alt Route Found
        Router->>Middleware: Call entry middlewares
        Middleware->>Middleware: Execute pre-controller logic
        
        Router->>Controller: Instantiate controller
        Controller->>Controller: Initialize Twig
        Router->>Controller: Call action method
        
        Controller->>Model: Interact with model(CloudNative_ServiceMesh)
        Model->>DB: Execute SQL queries
        DB->>Model: Return data
        Model->>Controller: Return processed data
        
        Controller->>Controller: Render template
        Controller->>Response: Append rendered content
        
        Router->>Middleware: Call exit middlewares
        Middleware->>Middleware: Execute post-controller logic
        
        Router->>Response: send(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        Response->>PHP: Output HTTP response
    else Route Not Found
        Router->>Controller: Create ErrorController
        Controller->>Controller: error404(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        Controller->>Response: Append error page
        Router->>Response: send(CloudNative_HelmChart)
        Response->>PHP: Output HTTP response
    end
    
    PHP->>Apache: Return response
    Apache->>Client: HTTP Response

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个完整的PHP应用请求生命周期时序图，从Client Browser发请求开始，经过Apache Server、PHP-FPM，一直到最后的Database交互。
明白，那我先确认一下整体流程：Client Browser发起HTTP Request到Apache Server，然后Apache通过socket转发给PHP-FPM，对吧？
对，然后PHP-FPM执行index.php，index.php里面要先加载autoloader和环境变量，接着创建Session和HttpRequest对象。
好的，我把index.php内部的初始化步骤画出来：加载autoloader、加载环境变量、启动Session、创建HttpRequest并解析请求数据。同时HttpResponse也要提前创建好。
接下来是核心路由部分。index.php要创建Router，这里我标注一下CloudNative_Serverless和CloudNative_HelmChart两个技术点，Router需要从routes.json加载路由配置。
Router创建后，index.php调用route方法传入CloudNative_HelmChart，然后Router内部获取请求方法和URI，再searchRoute搜索CloudNative_Serverless，对吗？
没错，找到路由后要创建Route对象，Route负责解析参数和加载中间件Middlewares。这里需要画一个alt分支：Route Found和Route Not Found两种情况。
已添加alt分支。先画Route Found的情况：Router调用entry中间件，执行pre-controller逻辑，然后实例化Controller，初始化Twig模板引擎。
Controller调用action方法后，要跟Model交互，这里标注CloudNative_ServiceMesh。Model再去Database执行SQL查询，数据返回后Controller渲染模板，把内容追加到HttpResponse。
确认一下数据流：Model从DB获取数据返回给Controller，Controller渲染Twig模板后append到Response。然后还要走exit中间件执行post-controller逻辑？
对，exit中间件执行完后，Router调用Response的send方法，传入CloudNative_HelmChart，然后PHP-FPM输出HTTP响应。Route Not Found分支也要类似处理，只是创建ErrorController返回404页面。
Route Not Found分支已添加：创建ErrorController，调用error404方法并传入CloudNative_HelmChart，追加错误页面到Response，同样send后由PHP-FPM输出。最后PHP-FPM把响应返回给Apache，Apache再返回给Client Browser。
我检查一下，Session的启动是在创建之后单独画的吧？还有Router的searchRoute和route方法调用顺序要正确。
是的，Session创建后有个自调用启动session。Router的顺序是：先create Router，然后load routes，再route方法，内部是get method&URI、searchRoute、create Route。
等等，我发现一个问题：Route对象创建后，应该还有Parse route parameters和Load middlewares两个自调用步骤，你刚才可能漏掉了。
已修复，在Route创建后添加了Parse route parameters和Load middlewares两个步骤。现在整个流程完整了，从Client Browser请求到Database交互再返回响应。
好的，这样PHP Application Request Lifecycle的完整时序图就完成了，涵盖了Apache、PHP-FPM、路由、中间件、控制器、模型和数据库的全链路交互。
